name: execute_menu_item
description: Executes Unity menu items (functions tagged with the MenuItem attribute)

name: select_gameobject
description: Selects game objects in the Unity hierarchy by path or instance ID

instance_id.description: Instance ID of the GameObject to select

name: update_gameobject
description: Updates a GameObject's core properties (name, tag, layer, active/static state), or creates it if it does not exist

tag.description: Tag to assign to the GameObject

active.description: Whether the GameObject should be active

is_static.description: Whether the GameObject should be static

name: update_component
description: Updates component fields on a GameObject or adds it if not present

component_type.description: Type name of the component to update or add

fields.description: Field name/value pairs to set on the component

name: add_package
description: Installs new packages in the Unity Package Manager

name: run_tests
description: Runs tests using the Unity Test Runner

filter.description: Filter tests by name or category

name: send_console_log
description: Sends a console log message to Unity

message.description: Message to log to the Unity console

name: add_asset_to_scene
description: Adds an asset from the AssetDatabase to the Unity scene

parent_path.description: Hierarchy path of the parent GameObject

position.description: World position to place the asset {x, y, z}

name: create_prefab
description: Creates a prefab with optional MonoBehaviour script and serialized field values

save_path.description: Project-relative path to save the prefab (e.g., 'Assets/Prefabs/MyPrefab.prefab')

field_values.description: Serialized field values to set on the script

name: create_scene
description: Creates a new scene and saves it to the specified path

save_path.description: Project-relative path to save the scene (e.g., 'Assets/Scenes/GameScene.unity')

name: load_scene
description: Loads a scene by path or name, with optional additive loading

scene_path.description: Project-relative path or name of the scene to load

additive.description: Load the scene additively without unloading current scene

name: delete_scene
description: Deletes a scene by path or name and removes it from Build Settings

scene_path.description: Project-relative path or name of the scene to delete

name: get_gameobject
description: Gets detailed information about a specific GameObject including all components

name: get_console_logs
description: Retrieves logs from the Unity console with pagination support

page_size.description: Number of log entries per page

name: recompile_scripts
description: Recompiles all scripts in the Unity project

name: save_scene
description: Saves the current active scene, with optional Save As functionality

save_as_path.description: Optional new path to save the scene to (Save As)

name: get_scene_info
description: Gets information about the active scene including name, path, and dirty state

name: unload_scene
description: Unloads a scene from the hierarchy (does not delete the scene asset)

scene_path.description: Project-relative path or name of the scene to unload

name: duplicate_gameobject
description: Duplicates a GameObject in the scene with optional renaming and reparenting

path.description: Hierarchy path to the GameObject to duplicate

parent_path.description: Hierarchy path of the new parent GameObject

name: delete_gameobject
description: Deletes a GameObject from the scene

path.description: Hierarchy path to the GameObject to delete

name: reparent_gameobject
description: Changes the parent of a GameObject in the hierarchy

path.description: Hierarchy path to the GameObject to reparent

new_parent_path.description: Hierarchy path of the new parent (empty string for root)

name: move_gameobject
description: Moves a GameObject to a new position in local or world space

name: rotate_gameobject
description: Rotates a GameObject to a new rotation in local or world space using Euler angles or quaternion

name: scale_gameobject
description: Scales a GameObject to a new local scale

name: set_transform
description: Sets position, rotation, and scale of a GameObject in a single operation

name: create_material
description: Creates a new material with a specified shader and saves it to the project

save_path.description: Project-relative path to save the material (e.g., 'Assets/Materials/MyMaterial.mat')

name: assign_material
description: Assigns a material to a GameObject's Renderer component

material_path.description: Project-relative path to the material asset

material_index.description: Index of the material slot to assign to (default 0)

name: modify_material
description: Modifies properties of an existing material (colors, floats, textures)

material_path.description: Project-relative path to the material asset

properties.description: Material property name/value pairs to set

name: get_material_info
description: Gets detailed information about a material including shader and all properties

material_path.description: Project-relative path to the material asset

name: batch_execute
description: Executes multiple tool operations in a single batch request with optional rollback on failure

operations.description: Array of tool operations to execute in sequence

rollback_on_failure.description: Whether to roll back all operations if one fails (default false)
